title: Design E2E Traceability
description: Design systems for linking E2E test traces (e.g., Playwright) with backend OpenTelemetry spans. Enable full-stack debugging of failed automated test runs through integrated traceability.
objectives: Design systems for linking E2E test traces (e.g., Playwright) with backend OpenTelemetry spans.
Enable full-stack debugging of failed automated test runs through integrated traceability.
